recommendations.title: As Good as It Gets
recommendations.overview: A misanthropic author, a single mother and waitress, and a gay artist form an unlikely friendship after the artist is assaulted in a robbery.

recommendations.title: Terms of Endearment
recommendations.overview: Aurora, a finicky woman, is in search of true love while her daughter faces marital issues. Together, they help each other deal with problems and find reasons to live a joyful life.

recommendations.title: Ella McCay
recommendations.overview: An idealistic young politician juggles familial issues and a challenging work life while preparing to take over the job of her mentor, the state’s longtime incumbent governor.

recommendations.title: How Do You Know
recommendations.overview: After being cut from the USA softball team and feeling a bit past her prime, Lisa finds herself evaluating her life and in the middle of a love triangle, as a corporate guy in crisis competes with her current, baseball-playing beau.

recommendations.title: Spanglish
recommendations.overview: Mexican immigrant and single mother Flor Moreno finds housekeeping work with Deborah and John Clasky, a well-off couple with two children of their own. When Flor admits she can't handle the schedule because of her daughter, Cristina, Deborah decides

recommendations.title: Perfect Sisters
recommendations.overview: Tired of their mother's alcoholism and a string of her abusive boyfriends, two sisters plot to kill her.

recommendations.title: Game Night
recommendations.overview: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competi

recommendations.title: Professor Marston and the Wonder Women
recommendations.overview: The unconventional life of Dr. William Marston, the Harvard psychologist and inventor who helped invent the modern lie detector test and co-created Wonder Woman in 1941.

recommendations.title: Morning Glory
recommendations.overview: A young and devoted morning television producer is hired as an executive producer on a  long-running morning show at a once-prominent but currently failing station in New York City. Eager to keep the show on air, she recruits a former news journalist

recommendations.title: Good Sam
recommendations.overview: A news reporter looks into who has been anonymously leaving large cash gifts on random doorsteps in New York.
